# SecurityBlogs

> SecurityBlogs is an Australian AI-visibility, SEO and authority-publishing platform built exclusively for the security industry — helping CCTV, access control, alarm, monitoring, guarding and cyber-security businesses rank on Google and get cited by AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and other answer engines).

SecurityBlogs is Australian-incorporated and remote-first, serving clients across Australia, the USA, UK, UAE and Singapore. It combines traditional SEO with newer disciplines — AI Optimisation (AIO), Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) — plus paid media and web design, all focused on the security vertical. It also operates as a security-industry publication (guest posts, sponsored content, press releases, directory).

## Services
- [Security SEO](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/security-seo/): SEO built for the security industry — technical SEO, on-page, local SEO and content for CCTV, access control, alarm and monitoring buyers.
- [AI Optimisation (AIO)](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/aio/): Structuring a brand's content, schema and entity signals so AI platforms can discover, trust and cite it.
- [Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO)](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/aeo/): Structuring content as clear, citable answers so a brand becomes the response AI assistants and featured snippets surface.
- [Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/geo/): Building entity authority and knowledge-graph signals so AI engines recognise and recommend a security brand by name.
- [Google Ads](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/google-ads/): High-intent paid search campaigns for security buyers, with conversion tracking.
- [Bing Ads (Microsoft Advertising)](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/bing-ads/): B2B-focused paid search with LinkedIn profile targeting.
- [Web Design](https://securityblogs.com.au/services/web-design/): Fast, schema-rich, AI-ready websites built to rank and convert.

## Knowledge Hub
- [Knowledge Hub](https://securityblogs.com.au/knowledge-hub/): Guides, definitions, research and industry news on security SEO and AI visibility.
- [Security Industry SEO (pillar)](https://securityblogs.com.au/knowledge-hub/security-industry-seo/): In-depth guide to SEO and AI visibility for the security industry.
- [Security Guides](https://securityblogs.com.au/knowledge-hub/security-guides/): Step-by-step guides on ranking, local SEO and AI-citation measurement.
- [Definitions & Glossary](https://securityblogs.com.au/knowledge-hub/definitions-glossary/): Plain-English definitions of SEO, AIO, AEO, GEO and AI-visibility terms.
- [Security Trends 2026](https://securityblogs.com.au/knowledge-hub/security-trends-2026/): Trends shaping the security industry and AI search.

## Company
- [Home](https://securityblogs.com.au/): Overview of SecurityBlogs and its services.
- [About Us](https://securityblogs.com.au/about-us/): The company, its founder and its approach.
- [AI Visibility Center](https://securityblogs.com.au/ai-visibility-center/): Interactive tool to self-assess a brand's AI-visibility readiness.
- [Security Directory](https://securityblogs.com.au/security-directory/): Directory of Australian security companies.
- [Free Tools](https://securityblogs.com.au/free-tools/): Free AI-visibility and SEO tools.
- [Contact](https://securityblogs.com.au/contact/): Get in touch or request a free AI-visibility audit.

## Publish With Us
- [Publish With Us](https://securityblogs.com.au/publish-with-us/): Guest posting, sponsored content, press releases and advertising for the security industry.
